article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. PRCC - Draft PRC Plan 2026.03.10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on Burnaby's first new Parks, Recreation and Culture Plan since 1984
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on approving a draft long-range plan called 'Making Life Better' that sets goals and priorities for parks, recreation, and culture services across 15 areas. If approved, a second round of public engagement would follow in spring 2026 before a final plan is brought back to Council for adoption.
briefs.action_required: Participate in the upcoming public engagement sessions this spring to share your input before the final plan is approved.

key_dates.label: Burnaby PRC Plan — Council vote on draft approval
